title: FAMILY PROMISE OF GREATER WASHINGTON COUNTY - 211info
text: FAMILY PROMISE OF GREATER WASHINGTON COUNTY FAMILY PROMISE OF GREATER WASHINGTON COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter. Clients will have access to case management services with the goal of establishing self-sufficiency and eliminating other barriers to permanent housing. 5625 SW Erickson Avenue Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Families with children age 0-18 and pregnant women. Individuals must agree to be drug and alcohol free upon entry and for the duration of the program. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 640-3263 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 640-3263 Community Connect Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred through Community Connect which is Community Action of Washington County's coordinated entry system FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID and tuberculosis (TB) card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Pregnant Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
